observations.archetype_gloss: The integrated center of consciousness and identity, representing wholeness and unity
observations.summary: Dan undergoes a painful inward implosion as he presses through a barrier, symbolizing a deep internal transformation and confrontation with his inner self leading towards integration.

evidence.quote: He pressed through. The barrier gave way—not with a burst, but with a painful inward implosion, like a collapsing lung—and then there was silence and release.

accepted_observations.summary: Dan undergoes a painful inward implosion as he presses through a barrier, symbolizing a deep internal transformation and confrontation with his inner self leading towards integration.
